mapper.select: SELECT member_no, birth_date, region_code, income, employ_status, major, education, mrg_stts_cd FROM member_profile WHERE member_no = #{memberNo}

SELECT b.benefit_no, b.plcy_nm, b.category_code, b.sprt_trgt_min_age, b.sprt_trgt_max_age, b.earn_min_amt, b.earn_max_amt, b.earn_cnd_se_cd, b.earn_etc_cn, b.mrg_stts_cd, b.school_cd, b.job_cd, b.conflict_group_code, b.is_active, b.apply_end_date FROM benefit b WHERE b.is_active = 'Y' AND ( b.sprt_trgt_min_age IS NULL OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, #{birthDate}, CURDATE()) >= b.sprt_trgt_min_age ) AND ( b.sprt_trgt_max_age IS NULL OR b.sprt_trgt_max_age >= TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, #{birthDate}, CURDATE()) ) AND (b.earn_cnd_se_cd = '0043001' OR (b.earn_cnd_se_cd = '0043002' AND #{income} BETWEEN b.earn_min_amt AND b.earn_max_amt)) AND (b.mrg_stts_cd IS NULL OR b.mrg_stts_cd = '0055003' OR b.mrg_stts_cd = #{mrgSttsCd}) AND (b.job_cd IS NULL OR b.job_cd = '0013010' OR b.job_cd = #{employStatus}) AND (b.school_cd IS NULL OR b.school_cd = '0049010' OR b.school_cd = #{education}) AND (NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM benefit_major bm WHERE bm.benefit_no = b.benefit_no ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM benefit_major bm WHERE bm.benefit_no = b.benefit_no AND bm.major_code = #{major} ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM benefit_major bm WHERE bm.benefit_no = b.benefit_no AND bm.major_code = '0011009' )) AND b.benefit_no NOT IN ( SELECT benefit_no FROM applied_benefit WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM applied_benefit ab JOIN benefit ob ON ob.benefit_no = ab.benefit_no WHERE ab.member_no = #{memberNo} AND ob.conflict_group_code IS NOT NULL AND b.conflict_group_code IS NOT NULL AND ob.conflict_group_code = b.conflict_group_code )
